def assign_mice_to_holes(mice_positions, hole_positions):
    mice_positions.sort()
    hole_positions.sort()

    max_distance = 0
    for i in range(len(mice_positions)):
        max_distance = max(max_distance, abs(mice_positions[i] - hole_positions[i]))

    return max_distance
